# nextjs-app

<!-- Generated by RepoCanon. Safe to edit by hand; regenerate with `repocanon generate claude .` to refresh inferred sections. -->

## Overview

`nextjs-app` is a single package repository written primarily in TypeScript. Detected frameworks/tools: Next.js, React, Vitest, Playwright, ESLint.

## Must run

- **Install**: `npm install`
- **Dev**: `npm run dev`
- **Build**: `npm run build`
- **Test**: `npm run test`
- **Lint**: `npm run lint`
- **Format**: `npm run format`
- **Typecheck**: `npm run typecheck`

## Layout

- `__tests__/` — tests
- `app/` — application
- `lib/` — library

## Conventions

- **JS/TS language**: TypeScript-first
- **TypeScript file naming**: camelCase modules
- **Next.js routing**: App Router under app/

## Uncertain

- No LICENSE file detected — license intent is unclear.
